content.en:
"The next auction item is the Black Thunder Grass!"

Kitano said.

The Black Thunder Grass is no stranger to many Eternal Masters above the Eighth Realm, this is a treasure that can have an effect on the will of the Transformation Realm, but it can only refine one plant, and the second plant has no effect.

Therefore, the Eternal Controller who possessed the Black Thunder Grass should have already refined one plant, so he took out this second plant and traded it in exchange for the treasure he needed.

Kitano Controller continued, "The Black Thunder Grass auction only accepts treasures that have been upgraded to the primordial mastery body. "

Treasures for treasures, it's normal!

Therefore, this auction is an exchange of two types of treasures.

Although Ye Tian wanted the Black Thunder Grass very much, he didn't have the corresponding treasure, so he could only look at it.

Soon, the Black Thunder Grass was auctioned off by a Nine Realm-level master.

Time passed, and the auction of treasures made Ye Tian's knowledge soar.

If it were in the outside world, such a treasure would hardly be seen, and it would even be enough to cause a big battle between the Nine Realms-level controllers, but here, they were put up for auction one by one.

No one dared to rob it, after all, this was the headquarters of the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce, and even the Ten Realm-level controllers would not dare to come here to make trouble.

......

Suddenly.

Kitano said: "Next are the three finale items of this auction, all of which are very precious treasures, first of all, the first treasure - the Celestial Stone!"

"It's finally the Celestial Stone's turn to be auctioned!"

The Snow Maiden Controller showed a strong interest, and the few Nine Realm-level Masters also radiated one after another.

Ye Tian didn't know what the Heavenly Boundary Stone was, so he was a little puzzled.

Thereupon.

He contacted the Snow Maiden controller and asked, "Fourth Senior Sister, what is the Heavenly Boundary Stone?"

The Snow Maiden's controller introduced, "The Celestial Stone is one of the treasures that can increase the success rate of opening up the Boundary River, and it is also one of my goals for participating in this auction!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

It can increase the success rate of opening up the Boundary River, and this kind of treasure is naturally the treasure that those Nine Realm level masters who want to attack the Ten Realm-level masters are most eager for.

Of course, most of the Nine Realm-level Masters would not bid for the Celestial Stone, because they had long lost hope of opening up the Boundary River to become the Ten Realm-level Masters.

These Nine Realm-level Masters were almost the same as Ye Tian's Senior Brother Jiang You, who had exhausted their potential in advance and would never be able to become a Ten-Realm Level Controller.

Therefore, they naturally wouldn't spend a huge price to bid for a Celestial Stone that didn't help him much.

They could only try their best to improve some of their strength at the Nine Realms level master, such as relying on certain secret techniques or other methods.

Of course, they also expected that in the future, the Origin Realm Sea would be able to give birth to other paths.

After all, today's cultivation path is also opened up, whether it is the volitional form realm or the primordial level control body, they all come out of nothing, and the changes in the self-created path and the opening up of the boundary river are also created.

Therefore, if other paths appeared, they still had the hope of becoming the Ten Realms-level masters.

However, there is little hope for this.

In the endless years of the Origin Realm Sea, no other path was born, and even those great beings who surpassed the Ten Realms could not deduce other paths.

Therefore, their limit was roughly the Nine Realms level master.

At this time.

The auction of the Celestial Stone has begun, and the owner of the Celestial Stone has asked for the treasure that will enhance the will of the Transformation Realm or the primordial-level control body as an exchange, and whoever sells the treasure is of high value and has a lot of treasures, he can naturally obtain the Celestial Stone.

In the end, after some competition, it was the Snow Maiden who succeeded in obtaining the Celestial Stone, but also paid a lot of treasures.

In fact, in this era of the Origin Realm Sea, there are only a few controllers who are qualified to attack the Ten Realms, and there are only a few of them who are close to the Ten Realms, so there are not many competitors for the Snow Maiden controllers.

Otherwise, she wouldn't have been able to bid on the Celestial Stone so easily.

Soon, the second finale item was put up for auction.

This time it is still one of the treasures that will help open up the boundary river, but it is not the Celestial Boundary Stone, but the Thousand Clouds Resting Soil, and its value is even higher than the Celestial Boundary Stone.

The auction was still fierce, and the final bidder was still the Snow Maiden.

Two treasures that helped open up the boundary river were photographed in a row, and everyone congratulated the Snow Maiden master.

"The Snow Maiden controller has a lot of money, and she has taken out so many treasures, even an ordinary Ten Realm-level controller may not have so many treasures!"

"With the background of the Snow Maiden's controller, and now that he has obtained the Thousand Clouds Rest Soil and the Heavenly Boundary Stone, I am afraid that there is a great hope of opening up the Boundary River, breaking the shackles with the help of the power of the Boundary River in one fell swoop, and being promoted to the Ten Realms level controller!"

"If the Snow Maiden Controller is promoted to the Snow Maiden Controller, then he has stepped into another circle, and I will congratulate the Snow Maiden Controller in advance here!"

How many of the many Eternal Masters are sincerely congratulated, only they know.

But the Snow Maiden knows very well that most of these people are envious and jealous, rather than genuinely congratulating.

She didn't care, she only had excitement in her heart at this time.

"Fortunately, I borrowed a lot of treasures from Senior Brother Ancient Demon and Senior Brother Black Decay early on, otherwise it would be really difficult to photograph these two treasures!" said the Snow Maiden in control.

After a while, the third and final finale item was put up for auction.

"The last finale item, a Daoyin Stone from the Valley of the Devil's Heart. "

Kitano Controller Road.

"What, the Daoyin Stone of Demon Heart Valley, who would actually take it out for auction?"

Many of the Eternal Masters were amazed.

Daoyin Stone?

Valley of the Devil's Heart?

Ye Tian was puzzled again, what is this.

But soon, he learned about the situation from the fourth senior sister Snow Girl.

The Demon Heart Valley is a very mysterious place in the Origin Realm Sea, a forbidden place from a long time ago, but now everyone dreams of a treasure land, but if you want to enter the Demon Heart Valley, if you don't have the Dao Yin Stone, it is almost impossible to move an inch.

And the Dao Yin Stone is only available in the depths of the Demon Heart Valley, and only the top Ten Realm-level controllers can go deep into the Demon Heart Valley and find the Dao Yin Stone.

But even so, Daoyin Stone is still very rare.

But if they don't hold the Dao Sound Stone in their hands, the Nine Realm-level controllers will fall and die when they enter the Demon Heart Valley.

As for the benefits of the Demon Heart Valley, the Snow Maiden controller didn't say anything, and he was afraid that Ye Tian would trespass without permission.

"When you are strong in the future, you can obtain the Daoyin Stone, and then enter the Demon Heart Valley!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
